example: He carefully combed his hair before going out.
He turned his head from side to side, testing the flexibility of his neck.
He gently washed his face with warm water and soap.
He closed his eyes and took a deep breath.
He held his nose as he walked past the garbage can.
He listened attentively with her hand cupped behind her ear.
He felt a tickling sensation as a butterfly landed on his cheek.
He gently rested his chin on her shoulder.
He chewed his food with his mouth closed, showing good manners.
He felt a sharp pain in his tooth and scheduled a dental appointment.
He kissed her gently on the lips.
